testPurpose.objective: Complete one four-player Juvenile-expansion match through visible UI and verify the private opening clue reaches exactly its holder without leaking identity or content to other tabs.

successCriteria.description: The host disables Inspector and enables Juvenile, and every tab visibly mirrors the same settings.
A naturally dealt Juvenile produces exactly one holder-private opening prompt, zero non-holder prompts, and no public holder identity or clue content.
Exact hands, draws, received cards, and actor-private results remain confined to the owning tab and owning agent Observation.
All four tabs complete the score-to-10 match and show the same normalized terminal result.

testPurpose.recommendationRationale: This is the smallest dedicated Juvenile certification candidate: four isolated players, only the Juvenile replacement enabled, and one complete production-time match. The public timeline records only aggregate isolation counts and an opaque private evidence reference. If no Juvenile checkpoint occurs naturally, the Run lacks required evidence and cannot pass.
